title: use container cgroups path
body:
When looking up a container's cgroup path, parse /proc/[PID]/cgroup.
This will work across all cgroup managers and configurations and is 
supported on cgroups v1 and v2.                                     

Fixes: #8265
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: Are we sure this is a consistent thing? AFAIK we pass that path into the OCI runtime as-is for container creation? I'm worried it will be different on runc vs crun
